languages.text: {n}Ваши слова повисают в воздухе. Себериан оборачивается и смотрит прямо вам в глаза. Без единого слова. В его лице — немой вопрос.{/n}
{n}Your words hang in the air. Seberian turns and looks you straight in the eye. Without a single word. An unspoken question on his face.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ваши слова повисают в воздухе. Себериан оборачивается и смотрит прямо вам в глаза. Без единого слова. В его лице — немой вопрос.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Your words hang in the air. Seberian turns and looks you straight in the eye. Without a single word. An unspoken question on his face.{/n}
{n}Your words hang in the air. Seberian turns and looks you straight in the eye. Without a single word. An unspoken question on his face.{/n}
{n}Your words hang in the air. Seberian turns and looks you straight in the eye. Without a single word. An unspoken question on his face.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Se hace el silencio tras tus palabras. Seberian se gira hacia ti y te mira a los ojos sin decir palabra, con una pregunta en el rostro.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your words hang in the air. Seberian turns and looks you straight in the eye. Without a single word. An unspoken question on his face.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Se hace el silencio tras tus palabras. Seberian se gira hacia ti y te mira a los ojos sin decir palabra, con una pregunta en el rostro.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你的话飘荡在半空中。塞贝里安转过身来，直直地盯着你。他一言不发，但眼神里满是疑问。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your words hang in the air. Seberian turns and looks you straight in the eye. Without a single word. An unspoken question on his face.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你的话飘荡在半空中。塞贝里安转过身来，直直地盯着你。他一言不发，但眼神里满是疑问。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seul le silence fait suite à votre réponse. Seberian se tourne vers vous et vous regarde droit dans les yeux. Il ne dit rien, mais une question se lit sur son visage.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your words hang in the air. Seberian turns and looks you straight in the eye. Without a single word. An unspoken question on his face.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seul le silence fait suite à votre réponse. Seberian se tourne vers vous et vous regarde droit dans les yeux. Il ne dit rien, mais une question se lit sur son visage.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sözlerin havada asılı kalıyor. Seberian sana dönüp doğrudan gözlerinin içine bakıyor. Tek kelime etmiyor. Yüzünde dile getirilmemiş bir soru ifade var.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your words hang in the air. Seberian turns and looks you straight in the eye. Without a single word. An unspoken question on his face.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sözlerin havada asılı kalıyor. Seberian sana dönüp doğrudan gözlerinin içine bakıyor. Tek kelime etmiyor. Yüzünde dile getirilmemiş bir soru ifade var.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Deine Worte schweben in der Luft. Seberian dreht sich um und blickt dir direkt in die Augen, ohne ein Wort zu sagen. Eine unausgesprochene Frage auf seinem Gesicht.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your words hang in the air. Seberian turns and looks you straight in the eye. Without a single word. An unspoken question on his face.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Deine Worte schweben in der Luft. Seberian dreht sich um und blickt dir direkt in die Augen, ohne ein Wort zu sagen. Eine unausgesprochene Frage auf seinem Gesicht.{/n}

languages.text: {n}あなたの言葉が空中に残る。セベリアンは振り返り、あなたの目をじっと見つめる。一言も言わない。彼の顔には、言われない質問が浮かんでいる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Your words hang in the air. Seberian turns and looks you straight in the eye. Without a single word. An unspoken question on his face.{/n}
